":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7513928707975679038","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【日轻】【恋爱喜剧】【东京日常】

人生重启，夏之介来到东京神保町，继承了爷爷留下的咖啡书店。

顺带一提，他也顺理成章地成为了……

楼上三位性格迥异、麻烦不断、问题多多女房客的房东先生。


啊，差点忘了。

还有隔壁那位总是找着各种蹩脚借口凑过来的、同样问题多多的优等生女孩子。

————

原本平淡悠闲、摸鱼划水的经营计划，在被她们闯入后，就变得有些不大对劲了起来。

从神保町的巷弄书店，到下北泽的闪耀舞台；

从隅田川映照彼此的夏夜流光，到本栖湖畔忽闪摇曳的秋日篝火——

夏之介发誓，他最初真的只是想安安静静经营书店。

【每位女主、剧情都精心准备，偏慢热，但质量保证】
【男主有原则有实力，无毒无害，放心食用】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o36eb8f2225e226f7e9fdfc41963485b7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"先吃口桃子吧","author_id":"","book_id":"7513928707975679038","book_name":"人在东京，合租少女们不太对劲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7480人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7513972215772103230","read_count":"7480","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1512732"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"712","tags":"都市种田,轻小说,基建,多女主,都市,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/93355be2b4bec4f7a4702a53f346b74e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162187&x-signature=NdT8C%2Fe3R2672fyE1ms4Ok44YCA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1544129856934263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"293"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114307F21F88C211587DEFDA91"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18591,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7626},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1754226142,"author_reply_time":1754226164,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529838065764827929","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优秀，很有日系轻小说的感觉，女主和男主性格刻画都挺好，男主亚撒西而不🐢，女主也都各有特色[大笑]
偏慢热，写了很多大大小小的事件推动男女主关系发展，让女主们的感情不像是无根之萍一样突然就喜欢，这样的节奏我很喜欢 [偷笑]         要是想看一两百张曹丕的可以走了，适合像我这种喜欢看慢热，有合理感情发展的多女主读者[你细品]
作者加油更新，早晚会火的[酷][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":23,"text":"都挺好","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739781877DEFDA91%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529838065764827929%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227513928707975679038%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753182562,"group_id":"7513928707975679038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"枫叶红时多离别","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxwHd/c3IQ77h5S4ubEGGXM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/67d8b089a4b74d86a6ae757269c3e360~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528569&x-signature=tPiXn7qAc29SgQrVGdmXj2lwXV4%3D","user_id":"102674076664","user_name":"修勾不会旺旺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102674076664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7513928707975679038","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【日轻】【恋爱喜剧】【东京日常】
